SEARCH
Package io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx

Class SimulationController

java.lang.Object
io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
public class SimulationController extends Object
Controller mediating communication between SimulationAbstraction model and JavaFX SimulationPresentation view.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SimulationController(int gridWidth, int gridHeight)
    Constructs a SimulationController with a new simulation of the specified grid dimensions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearSimulation()
    Resets the entire simulation to a clean state.
    double
    getAbsorptionRate()
    Gets the global absorption rate for pollution.
    Map<String,Integer>
    getCellTypeCounts()
    Gets the count of each cell type in the grid.
    Map<String,Double>
    getCellTypePercentages()
    Gets the percentage of each cell type in the grid.
    double
    getDiffusionRate()
    Gets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
    GridController
    getGridControl()
    Gets the grid controller managed by this simulation.
    int
    getGridHeight()
    Gets the height of the simulation grid.
    int
    getGridWidth()
    Gets the width of the simulation grid.
    List<Integer>
    getPollutedAirHistory()
    Gets the history of the number of polluted air cells.
    SimulationView

    Gets the associated simulation view presentation.

    Gets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.

    Gets the wind direction.
    double

    Gets the wind strength.

    Restores a simulation state from a binary file and rebuilds the controller links.
    void
    recordCurrentStats()
    Scans the grid, calculates aggregate statistics, and records them in history.
    void

    Resets the simulation with a new grid size, preserving the existing simulation parameters.

    Saves the current simulation abstraction to a binary file.

    Sets the global absorption rate for pollution.

    Sets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
    void
    setPresentation(SimulationView presentation)
    Sets the simulation view presentation and updates it.
    void
    setSpeedDelayMs(int delayMs)
    Sets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.
    void
    setWindDirection(WindDirection direction)
    Sets the wind direction.
    void
    setWindStrength(double strength)
    Sets the wind strength.
    void
    tick()
    Performs a single simulation step (double-buffered tick).
    void
    tickMultiple(int count)
    Loops a specified number of ticks.
    void
    updatePresentation()
    Triggers the Presentation dashboard to update charts and text panels.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationController

      public SimulationController(int gridWidth, int gridHeight)
      Constructs a SimulationController with a new simulation of the specified grid dimensions.
      Parameters:
      gridWidth - the width of the grid
      gridHeight - the height of the grid

  • Method Details

    • getPresentation

      public SimulationView getPresentation()
      Gets the associated simulation view presentation.
      Returns:
      the simulation view presentation

    • setPresentation

      public void setPresentation(SimulationView presentation)
      Sets the simulation view presentation and updates it.
      Parameters:
      presentation - the simulation view presentation to associate

    • getGridControl

      public GridController getGridControl()
      Gets the grid controller managed by this simulation.
      Returns:
      the grid controller

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Performs a single simulation step (double-buffered tick).

    • tickMultiple

      public void tickMultiple(int count)
      Loops a specified number of ticks.
      Parameters:
      count - the number of ticks to run

    • recordCurrentStats

      public void recordCurrentStats()
      Scans the grid, calculates aggregate statistics, and records them in history.

    • saveSimulation

      public void saveSimulation(File file) throws IOException
      Saves the current simulation abstraction to a binary file.
      Parameters:
      file - the target file to save the simulation
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during saving

    • loadSimulation

      public void loadSimulation(File file) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Restores a simulation state from a binary file and rebuilds the controller links.
      Parameters:
      file - the source file to load the simulation from
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during loading
      ClassNotFoundException - if the class of a serialized object cannot be found

    • updatePresentation

      public void updatePresentation()
      Triggers the Presentation dashboard to update charts and text panels.

    • getPollutedAirHistory

      public List<Integer> getPollutedAirHistory()
      Gets the history of the number of polluted air cells.
      Returns:
      a list of polluted air counts per tick

    • clearSimulation

      public void clearSimulation()
      Resets the entire simulation to a clean state.

    • getDiffusionRate

      public double getDiffusionRate()
      Gets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
      Returns:
      the diffusion rate

    • setDiffusionRate

      public void setDiffusionRate(double rate)
      Sets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
      Parameters:
      rate - the new diffusion rate

    • getAbsorptionRate

      public double getAbsorptionRate()
      Gets the global absorption rate for pollution.
      Returns:
      the absorption rate

    • setAbsorptionRate

      public void setAbsorptionRate(double rate)
      Sets the global absorption rate for pollution.
      Parameters:
      rate - the new absorption rate

    • getSpeedDelayMs

      public int getSpeedDelayMs()
      Gets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.
      Returns:
      the speed delay in milliseconds

    • setSpeedDelayMs

      public void setSpeedDelayMs(int delayMs)
      Sets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.
      Parameters:
      delayMs - the new delay in milliseconds

    • getWindStrength

      public double getWindStrength()
      Gets the wind strength.
      Returns:
      the wind strength

    • setWindStrength

      public void setWindStrength(double strength)
      Sets the wind strength.
      Parameters:
      strength - the new wind strength

    • getWindDirection

      public WindDirection getWindDirection()
      Gets the wind direction.
      Returns:
      the wind direction

    • setWindDirection

      public void setWindDirection(WindDirection direction)
      Sets the wind direction.
      Parameters:
      direction - the new wind direction

    • getGridWidth

      public int getGridWidth()
      Gets the width of the simulation grid.
      Returns:
      the grid width

    • getGridHeight

      public int getGridHeight()
      Gets the height of the simulation grid.
      Returns:
      the grid height

    • getCellTypeCounts

      public Map<String,Integer> getCellTypeCounts()
      Gets the count of each cell type in the grid.
      Returns:
      a map mapping cell type names to their counts

    • getCellTypePercentages

      public Map<String,Double> getCellTypePercentages()
      Gets the percentage of each cell type in the grid.
      Returns:
      a map mapping cell type names to their percentage share

    • resizeAndReset

      public void resizeAndReset(int width, int height)
      Resets the simulation with a new grid size, preserving the existing simulation parameters.
      Parameters:
      width - the new width of the grid
      height - the new height of the grid
